To consume hwr one must first transpose the whole tail through the (h≫f)-composite adjunction homEquiv.injective. LHS-only re-transpose is CIRCULAR (re-folds R0-peel). 5th consecutive stall on this lane; sorry 18→18.

But hwr is currently DEAD CODE — declared, never consumed before the sorry (auditor MAJOR flag).

next_steps: Either: (a) one focused prover pass on step (iii) transposition (homEquiv.injective via leftAdjointCompNatTrans_assoc), then rw [hwr]; OR (b) given this is the 5th stall with no sorry reduction, consider a structural-refactor / mathlib-analogist consult on whether the tail's spelling should be pinned differently before more helper rounds. findings.blocker: sliceDualTransportInv.app: dualUnitRingSwapHom f (f⁻¹ᵁ W') lands in 𝟙_ (ModuleCat ↑(X.presheaf.obj (op (f''ᵁf⁻¹ᵁW')))) but the goal target is 𝟙_ (ModuleCat ↑(X.presheaf.obj (op W'))). These differ only by the open-equality he : f''ᵁf⁻¹ᵁW' = W' but live in DISTINCT ModuleCat fibers — a plain eqToHom at ModuleCat level cannot bridge across fibers (subst hW' fails, W' is set-local).

attempts.insight: Extraction resolves the deferred-metavar-under-binder blocker; the residual is the app MORPHISM, not the def packaging or ≃ₗ-by-hand instances.

attempts.insight: Down-set facts hW'fV, hPV, he all axiom-clean and in place.

attempts.strategy: Build the app morphism: ψ-reindex composed with dualUnitRingSwapHom, conjugated by eqToHom across he
attempts.code_tried: refine eqToHom ?_ ≫ ((ModuleCat.restrictScalars (f.appIso (f⁻¹ᵁ W')).hom.hom).map (ψ.app (op (Over.mk (homOfLE hPV)))) ≫ dualUnitRingSwapHom f (f⁻¹ᵁ W')) ≫ eqToHom ?_
attempts.lean_error: the middle ψ-reindex + dualUnitRingSwapHom type-checks up to he, but eqToHom cannot bridge distinct ModuleCat fibers
attempts.insight: Genuine close (~20-40 LOC): conjugate the codomain by a dualUnitRingSwap-style ε-iso along the ring iso X.presheaf.map (eqToHom (op he)) (a restrictScalars-ε swap for the eqToHom ring map), mirror on the M-source leg. invFun wired anyway (sliceDualTransport internal holes 4→3).

next_steps: Prove pass on sliceDualTransportInv.app: build the eqToHom-ring-iso ε-conjugation for the codomain (and source M-leg) using the same restrictScalars-ε machinery dualUnitRingSwapHom uses for f.appIso, applied to the open-equality he. Then naturality (Subsingleton.elim + ε-naturality square), then sliceDualTransport's left_inv/right_inv (f.appIso cancellation + he bijection).
